query: CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION fp_dentro_horario_comercial(p_sub TEXT DEFAULT NULL) RETURNS BOOLEAN LANGUAGE plpgsql AS $$ DECLARE dow INT; h INT; m INT; hoje DATE; eh_feriado BOOLEAN; BEGIN hoje := (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo')::DATE; dow := EXTRACT(DOW FROM (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'))::INT; h := EXTRACT(HOUR FROM (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'))::INT; m := EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo'))::INT; SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM feriados WHERE data = hoje AND (cliente_subdominio IS NULL OR cliente_subdominio = p_sub)) INTO eh_feriado; IF eh_feriado THEN RETURN FALSE; END IF; IF dow BETWEEN 1 AND 5 THEN RETURN (h >= 8 AND h < 17) OR (h = 17 AND m < 55); ELSIF dow = 6 THEN RETURN (h >= 8 AND h < 11) OR (h = 11 AND m < 55); ELSE RETURN FALSE; END IF; END; $$;
